title: solanum americanum subsp. nutans
intro: Solanum americanum subsp. nutans, also known as the prickly nightshade or black nightshade, is a subspecies of the Solanum americanum plant, belonging to the Solanaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Solanum americanum subsp. nutans include its ability to reduce pain, swelling, and inflammation, as well as its antimicrobial properties, which help to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
